transcript: おやすみなさい Terima kasih telah menonton! Welcome to Calm. Close your eyes. Breathe in. Breathe out. Slowly. Your daily distractions are roadblocks to peace. Breathe in. Breathe out. Relinquish control. Good. Breathe in. Turn on your computer. Breathe out. Breathe in. Tell Chet you're not doing shit tonight. Breathe out. Come on, Tom. In. Quit your job. Breathe out. Do it, Tom. Breathe in, cut Sarah loose, and breathe out. You've come so far, Tom. Pure calm is just around the corner. It's okay, Tom. Good. Now, turn off your computer and throw away your phone. Let's go to the beach. Breathe, Tom. In. Out. Relinquish control. In. Out. relax step forward breathe in control. In. Out. Relax. Step forward. Breathe in. Breathe out. In. Out. Take another step. Then another. You're almost there. Take another step. Then another. Then another, then another, then another. Welcome to Calm.
